title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Dineout Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Dineout Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dineout Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dineout Capital India:
Dineout Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout Capital India!
